name: Miracle Visor
implicitMods: -2 to Level of Socketed Support Gems
+2 to Level of Socketed Skill Gems

Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 16 Concentrated Effect
craftedMods: +1 to Level of Socketed AoE Gems

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill that hits or burns enemies, or inflicts elemental ailments.
explicitMods: Supported Skills deal 34% more Elemental Damage
Supported Skills cannot inflict Elemental Ailments
Supported Skills deal 10% increased Elemental Damage
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Summons a totem that casts a beam of fire at you and each other totem you control, dealing burning damage to enemies caught in the beam. Enemies near either end of a beam also suffer burning damage. Reaching maximum active totem count will cause all totems from this skill to detonate, applying the same burning damage for a duration.
explicitMods: +1 to maximum number of Summoned Totems per maximum Power Charge
Deals 2513.6 Base Fire Damage per second
Modifiers to Spell Damage apply to this Skill's Damage Over Time effect
Summons a Totem which uses this Skill
Burning Damage applied by Detonation deals 40% more Damage per Totem Detonated
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.
